prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.9 kg; Height 160.9 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.3%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 206mg/dL; 6 months ago 225mg/dL; 3 months ago 216mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.1kg; 9 months ago 64.3kg; 6 months ago 60.9kg; 3 months ago 62.8kg; current 63.9kg), Height (12 months ago 160.9cm; 9 months ago 160.9cm; 6 months ago 160.9cm; 3 months ago 160.9cm; current 160.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 5.0U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 61mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 80mg/g; 9 months ago 121mg/g; 6 months ago 95mg/g; 3 months ago 97mg/g; current 132mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 146mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 148mg/dL; 3 months ago 146mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.8g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
